chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4939 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ اَلْخَمْرَ لِفِعْلِهَا وَ فَسَادِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4939 - Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has forbidden alcohol because of its effects and its corruption."
